rage.effect: +2 damage on STR melee, resistance to B/P/S damage, can't cast or concentrate while raging

level1Features.name: Rage
level1Features.description: Bonus action. +2 melee STR damage, resistance to B/P/S damage, advantage on STR checks/saves. Lasts 1 minute. 2 uses/long rest.

level1Features.name: Unarmored Defense
level1Features.description: AC = 10 + DEX mod + CON mod when not wearing armor.

level1Features.name: Reckless Attack
level1Features.description: Advantage on first STR melee attack roll, but ALL attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.

racialTraits.name: Relentless Endurance
racialTraits.description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright: drop to 1 HP instead. 1/long rest.

racialTraits.name: Savage Attacks
racialTraits.description: On a melee weapon critical hit, roll one additional weapon damage die.

racialTraits.name: Darkvision
racialTraits.description: 60 ft darkvision.

notes_data_corrections: Action Surge is a level 2 feature — removed from level 1 stat block
Frenzy (Berserker) is a level 3 feature — not applicable at level 1

level1Features.name: Bardic Inspiration
level1Features.description: Bonus action. Give one creature within 60ft a d6 they can add to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw in the next 10 min. CHA mod (3) uses/long rest.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: CHA-based. 2 first-level slots at level 1.

level1Features.name: Jack of All Trades
level1Features.description: Add half proficiency bonus (+1) to any ability check you're not proficient in.

racialTraits.name: Fey Ancestry
racialTraits.description: Advantage on saves vs. charm; can't be magically put to sleep.

racialTraits.name: Skill Versatility
racialTraits.description: Proficiency in 2 extra skills of choice (already factored into skills list).

racialTraits.name: Darkvision
racialTraits.description: 60 ft darkvision.

notes_data_corrections: College of Lore features (Cutting Words, etc.) are level 3 — not applicable at level 1
Expertise listed in data; only 2 skills get Expertise at level 1 (Persuasion, Deception applied)

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: WIS-based. Prepared = WIS mod (3) + level (1) = 4 spells. 2 first-level slots.

level1Features.name: Disciple of Life (Life Domain)
level1Features.description: Whenever you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores HP, the target regains additional HP = 2 + spell level.

level1Features.name: Heavy Armor Proficiency (Life Domain)
level1Features.description: Gain proficiency in heavy armor.

racialTraits.name: Dwarven Resilience
racialTraits.description: Advantage on saves vs. poison; resistance to poison damage.

racialTraits.name: Stonecunning
racialTraits.description: Double proficiency on History checks related to stone.

racialTraits.description: +1 HP per level (already included in HP total).

racialTraits.name: Darkvision
racialTraits.description: 60 ft darkvision.

Preserve Life (Channel Divinity) is also level 2

weapons.note: Pulls target 10ft toward you on hit

level1Features.description: Can use DEX instead of STR for unarmed strikes and monk weapons. Unarmed damage = 1d4 (level 1). After Attack action with unarmed or monk weapon, make one unarmed strike as bonus action.

weapons.name: Longsword+Smite
weapons.note: Divine Smite: expend 1st-level spell slot on hit for +2d8 radiant

divineSmite.note: On a hit, expend a spell slot for +2d8 radiant (1st-level) per slot level

layOnHands.note: Action: restore any HP amount from pool. 5 pts = cure disease/poison instead.

divineSense.note: Action: detect celestials/fiends/undead within 60ft until end of turn. 1+CHA mod uses/long rest.

level1Features.name: Divine Sense
level1Features.description: Action: know location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60ft until end of turn. 1+CHA mod (3) uses/long rest.

level1Features.name: Lay on Hands
level1Features.description: Action: restore HP from a 5-HP pool (level × 5). 5 points can cure one disease or one poison instead.

level1Features.name: Divine Smite
level1Features.description: After a hit with a melee weapon, expend a spell slot to deal additional radiant damage: 2d8 per 1st-level slot (+1d8 per additional slot level, max 5d8).

level1Features.name: Fighting Style (Great Weapon Fighting)
level1Features.description: See Fighter.

racialTraits.name: Draconic Ancestry (Fire)
racialTraits.description: Breath weapon: 15ft cone, DEX DC 13, 2d6 fire. 1/rest.

racialTraits.name: Damage Resistance
racialTraits.description: Resistance to fire damage.

Dragonborn breath weapon restores after short or long rest per PHB p.34

level1Features.name: Favored Enemy (one type)
level1Features.description: Advantage on Survival checks to track and on INT checks to recall info about the favored enemy type.

level1Features.name: Natural Explorer (one terrain)
level1Features.description: Difficult terrain doesn't slow in favored terrain. Various exploration bonuses.

level1Features.name: Fighting Style (Archery)
level1Features.description: +2 bonus to ranged weapon attack rolls (already factored into Longbow bonus above).

racialTraits.name: Lucky
racialTraits.description: When you roll a 1 on a d20, reroll and use the new roll.

racialTraits.name: Brave
racialTraits.description: Advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

racialTraits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
racialTraits.description: Can move through the space of any creature that is of a larger size.

racialTraits.name: Naturally Stealthy
racialTraits.description: Can attempt to hide when obscured by a creature at least one size larger.

Hunter's Mark is a level 2 spell feature — not available at level 1

sneakAttack.condition: Advantage on attack OR ally within 5ft of target (and no disadvantage on attack)

level1Features.name: Sneak Attack
level1Features.description: Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage to one target when: (a) advantage on the attack roll, or (b) an ally is within 5ft of the target and you don't have disadvantage. Works with finesse and ranged weapons.

weapons.name: Eldritch Blast
weapons.note: At level 1, no Agonizing Blast — CHA not added to damage

acFormula: Unarmored: 10 + DEX(3) = 13. With Mage Armor: 13 + DEX(3) = 16.

arcaneRecovery.note: Once per day during short rest: recover spent spell slots totaling half wizard level (1) rounded up = 1 first-level slot.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: INT-based. Spellbook starts with 6 spells. Prepare INT mod (3) + level (1) = 4 spells. 2 first-level slots.

level1Features.name: Arcane Recovery
level1Features.description: Once per day, during a short rest, recover spell slots totaling Wizard level / 2 rounded up = 1 first-level slot.

level1Features.name: Ritual Casting
level1Features.description: Can cast spells with Ritual tag without expending a slot (takes 10 min extra). Detect Magic is a ritual.

level1Features.name: Evocation Savant
level1Features.description: Costs half gold and time to copy evocation spells into spellbook. (Level 1 subclass benefit)

level1Features.name: Sculpt Spells
level1Features.description: When casting evocation spell, choose up to 1 + spell level creatures in area. Chosen creatures auto-succeed saves and take no damage. (Level 2 feature — NOT level 1)
